project: Holybro X500 V2 WebGL Technical Viewer
purpose: Bilingual source of truth for the runtime multilingual information panel. It separates user-readable technical copy from CAD/runtime traceability keys.

languagePolicy.rule: Render either the complete English card or the complete Spanish card. Do not mix section labels, descriptions or assembly text across languages in the same panel.
languagePolicy.properNounException: Hardware names, connector names, firmware names and protocol names such as Pixhawk, Holybro, JST-GH, XT60, MAVLink, PX4, ArduPilot and GNSS remain as technical proper nouns.

displayPolicy.title: Use the natural technical name. Do not expose Unity, Blender, FBX or CAD keys as the primary title.
displayPolicy.summary: Short visible text next to the title. Do not append contained subpiece lists to this summary.
displayPolicy.relationship: Mother parts and hotspots use Contained Parts / Piezas contenidas. Subpieces and fasteners use Parent Assembly / Pieza madre.
displayPolicy.keyReferences: Always last, lower visual contrast in UI, for runtime/CAD/source traceability rather than everyday assembly reading.

identification.label: Nivel de componente
identification.value: Familia de fijación / pieza modular generada

specifications.label: Longitud
specifications.value: Sin vástago de tornillo; la altura de la tuerca no está especificada en la fuente modular

specifications.label: Tipo de accionamiento
specifications.value: Sin interfaz de accionamiento de tornillo; se identifica por geometría de tuerca/separador

relationship.title: Pieza madre
items: Módulo de potencia PM02 V3 x4

assembly: Usar el tamaño métrico y el contexto de pieza madre para identificar a qué unión pertenece cada instancia.
Los procedimientos de torque y servicio no se incluyen en el alcance actual de la app.

keyReferences.label: Nota de trazabilidad
keyReferences.value: Tuerca ciega. Pieza modelada en base al CAD LM-M3-DING. La fuente sincronizada espera 8 unidades mientras la escena temporal actual contiene 16.

en.title: Nyloc Nut M3
en.summary: Nyloc Nut M3 used as a modular fastener family in the X500 V2 WebGL model. It clamps or spaces assemblies according to its runtime parent context.

specifications.label: Length
specifications.value: No screw shaft; nut height is not specified in the modular source

specifications.label: Drive type
specifications.value: No screw-drive interface; identified by nut/spacer geometry

assembly: Use the metric size and parent context to identify where the individual instance belongs.
Torque and service procedures are not included in the current app scope.

keyReferences.label: Trace note
keyReferences.value: Self-locking nut. Modeled from CAD key LM-M3-NILONG.

resolvedDecisions.decision_en: The delivered app describes the navigation module as Holybro M10 GPS.
resolvedDecisions.decision_es: La app entregada describe el módulo de navegación como GPS Holybro M10.
resolvedDecisions.reason: Confirmed by project decision on 2026-06-02; current project asset uses M10.

resolvedDecisions.decision_en: Visible user-facing naming is PM02 V3; PM06 labels remain only as CAD/runtime traceability keys.
resolvedDecisions.decision_es: El nombre visible para usuarios es PM02 V3; las etiquetas PM06 se conservan solo como claves CAD/de tiempo de ejecución.
resolvedDecisions.reason: Confirmed by project decision on 2026-06-02 and aligned with the official Pixhawk 6C X500 V2 kit source.

resolvedDecisions.decision_en: Weights are shown as coherent project estimates. Contextual subpiece estimates are normalized so subpiece sums match the selected parent assembly estimate when parent/subpiece data exists.
resolvedDecisions.decision_es: Los pesos se muestran como estimaciones coherentes del proyecto. Las estimaciones contextuales de subpiezas se normalizan para que la suma coincida con la estimación de la pieza madre seleccionada cuando existen datos padre/subpieza.
resolvedDecisions.reason: Confirmed by project decision on 2026-06-02; estimates use internal model mass hints and parent assembly weights.

resolvedDecisions.decision_en: Service-level fields such as torque, replacement procedure and inspection interval will not be added to the current app scope.
resolvedDecisions.decision_es: Los campos de servicio como torque, procedimiento de reemplazo e intervalo de inspección no se añadirán al alcance actual de la app.
resolvedDecisions.reason: Confirmed by project decision on 2026-06-02; the catalog avoids inventing service data.
